    [Documentation](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tWm33lJx4JdwN-Joqk7vydxQHaRGLod68wdS4k_hY9w/edit?tab=t.edb6z98lya3r#heading=h.2j0sep9c1ren)[Privacy Policy](https://support.taskrabbit.com/hc/en-us/articles/46260465608603-Taskrabbit-Global-Terms-of-Service?sso_checked=true)[Support](https://support.taskrabbit.com/hc/en-us/requests/new?sso_checked=true)
    

The Taskrabbit MCP connector lets Claude check service availability and pricing in the user's location. When a service is available, Claude guides the user through scoping questions to understand their needs — such as room count, space type, and other relevant details — then surfaces accurate local pricing and connects them with a booking link. Currently supported capabilities include availability checks, location-based pricing, and scoping conversations across Taskrabbit's range of home services.

You can use Taskrabbit Booking Assistance to:

**Find help fast:**  
"I need someone to mount a 65-inch TV in San Francisco this weekend"

**Compare services:**  
"What Taskrabbit services are available for moving a 1-bedroom apartment in Brooklyn?"

**Book a Tasker:**  
"Find a highly-rated Tasker for furniture assembly near 94110"
